description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and weekly on a schedule. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-24.04 to test multiple Python versions and XCB protocol versions. For each combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, run Ruff checks, set up Haskell with GHC 9.6 and the latest Cabal, install X11 apps, clone and checkout the specified XCB protocol version, and run make check.
